MaxLineLength:CircleDao.kt$CircleDao$@Query("SELECT DISTINCT c.* FROM circles c INNER JOIN circle_member_cross_ref cm ON c.id = cm.circleId WHERE cm.contactId = :contactId ORDER BY c.sortOrder ASC")

MaxLineLength:ContactDao.kt$ContactDao$/** Callers MUST escape the [value] parameter with [com.tang.prm.util.escapeSqlWildcards] before passing it, otherwise `%`, `_`, `\` will be treated as SQL wildcards. */

MaxLineLength:ContactDao.kt$ContactDao$@Query("SELECT * FROM contacts WHERE (:keyword IS NULL OR name LIKE '%' || :keyword || '%' ESCAPE '\\' OR nickname LIKE '%' || :keyword || '%' ESCAPE '\\' OR phone LIKE '%' || :keyword || '%' ESCAPE '\\') AND (:groupId IS NULL OR groupId = :groupId) AND (:relationship IS NULL OR relationship = :relationship) ORDER BY intimacyScore DESC")

MaxLineLength:ContactDao.kt$ContactDao$@Query("SELECT * FROM contacts WHERE name LIKE '%' || :keyword || '%' ESCAPE '\\' OR nickname LIKE '%' || :keyword || '%' ESCAPE '\\' OR phone LIKE '%' || :keyword || '%' ESCAPE '\\'")

MaxLineLength:ContactDao.kt$ContactDao$@Query("SELECT id, hobby, habit, diet, skill FROM contacts WHERE hobby LIKE '%' || :value || '%' ESCAPE '\\' OR habit LIKE '%' || :value || '%' ESCAPE '\\' OR diet LIKE '%' || :value || '%' ESCAPE '\\' OR skill LIKE '%' || :value || '%' ESCAPE '\\'")
MaxLineLength:ContactDao.kt$ContactDao$@Query("SELECT id, name, avatar, nickname, phone, relationship, groupId, intimacyScore, lastInteractionTime, updatedAt FROM contacts ORDER BY updatedAt DESC")

MaxLineLength:EventDao.kt$EventDao$@Query("SELECT * FROM events WHERE type != 'CONVERSATION' AND (:keyword IS NULL OR title LIKE '%' || :keyword || '%' ESCAPE '\\' OR description LIKE '%' || :keyword || '%' ESCAPE '\\' OR location LIKE '%' || :keyword || '%' ESCAPE '\\') ORDER BY time DESC")

MaxLineLength:EventDao.kt$EventDao$@Query("SELECT * FROM events WHERE type = :type AND (:keyword IS NULL OR title LIKE '%' || :keyword || '%' ESCAPE '\\' OR description LIKE '%' || :keyword || '%' ESCAPE '\\' OR location LIKE '%' || :keyword || '%' ESCAPE '\\') ORDER BY time DESC")
MaxLineLength:EventDao.kt$EventDao$@Query("SELECT e.* FROM events e INNER JOIN event_participants ep ON e.id = ep.eventId WHERE ep.contactId = :contactId ORDER BY e.time DESC")

MaxLineLength:MigrationShortcuts.kt$<no name provided>$"SELECT id, title, start_time, end_time, location, description, is_all_day, remind_time, is_repeat, repeat_rule, color, created_at, updated_at FROM events"

MaxLineLength:MigrationShortcuts.kt$<no name provided>$db.execSQL("CREATE TABLE event_participants_new (eventId INTEGER NOT NULL, contactId INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(eventId, contactId), FOREIGN KEY(eventId) REFERENCES events(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY(contactId) REFERENCES contacts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE)")
MaxLineLength:MigrationShortcuts.kt$<no name provided>$db.execSQL("UPDATE thoughts SET type = CASE WHEN contactId IS NOT NULL THEN 'friend' WHEN isPrivate = 1 THEN 'private' ELSE 'murmur' END")

MaxLineLength:Migration_1_32.kt$<no name provided>$db.execSQL("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `anniversaries_tmp` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `contactId` INTEGER, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `type` TEXT NOT NULL, `date` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isLunar` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isRepeat` INTEGER NOT NULL, `reminderDays` INTEGER NOT NULL, `remarks` TEXT, `icon` TEXT, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updatedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(`contactId`) REFERENCES `contacts`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE)")

MaxLineLength:Migration_1_32.kt$<no name provided>$db.execSQL("CREATE TABLE circles_new (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, color TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '#6366F1', icon TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'people', waveform TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'sine', parentCircleId INTEGER, intimacyThreshold INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, sortOrder INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, createdAt INTEGER NOT NULL, updatedAt INTEGER NOT NULL)")

MaxLineLength:Migration_1_32.kt$<no name provided>$db.execSQL("CREATE TABLE event_participants_new (eventId INTEGER NOT NULL, contactId INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(eventId, contactId), FOREIGN KEY(eventId) REFERENCES events(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY(contactId) REFERENCES contacts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE)")
